How to Create Stunning Websites Using AI Tools (Step-by-Step Guide)
So what's the secret sauce for generating production worthy websites like the cover page ? Lets try to debug it and understand what makes a site appealing in the first place ? 🤔
As a Design Engineer , I know about those small details, interactions , micro spacings, motion timings etc that makes a site go from AI SLOP to "WOW THAT'S AI"?
Below is the step by step understanding of what's happening . On the left side we have the actual process of generation and on the right side we have the prompt creation technique. Let's dive deeper
Step by step understanding of UI Creation

STEP 1 : FIND INSPIRATION

This is the most important step if you want to create a website without any design experience. Find sites that you personally like and want to recreate. Match the theme of your project with it , explore Pinterest , Dribble, Mobbin etc and pick something that you like.
Find something like this that you really like and feel will match the vibe of your application . For the above example we shall go with a cute themed background website.
Search for theme and bg inspo on pinterest

STEP 2 : CONVERT TO A LANDING PAGE BG

Go to ChatGPT or NanoBanana 2 , upload your selected image and then give this prompt . Update this prompt secondary details according to the image you have selected
json
{ "aspect_ratio": "16:9", "style": "Stylized 3D render, dreamlike, soft-focus aesthetic", "composition": { "horizon_level": "bottom 40%", "primary_focus": "vast, empty, clear blue sky for typography", "foreground": "use refernce image", "background": "minimal, very light and diffuse white clouds on a bright blue canvas" }, "lighting": "Use existing lighting from source; no added effects", "subject_details": { "meadow": "A low-mid-profile field of soft pink, yellow, and purple 3D flowers", "atmosphere": "A few delicate floating petals; no large subjects or flowers interrupting the central sky area", "texture": "Soft, smooth surfaces rather than high-frequency detailing; painterly and clean feel" }, "quality": "Landing page optimized, clean edges, clear image, minimalist and airy" }
Conversion though GPT
Play with the prompt a little bit until desired output is reached , the prompt above may take you 80% there. I will create another tutorial to teach you how to master this as well.

STEP 3 : THE LOVABLE MAGIC

Now we have our bg image ready , lets work on creating the actual website . Here comes the real knowledge of basic design systems and anti-AI slop you need to know :
  1. The fonts
  2. Fonts tracking and leading
  3. Phosphor icons instead of Lucide icons
  4. Understanding Insets and shadows ( MEDIUM - HARD)
  5. Blur to reveal animations

STEP 3.1 : HOW TO CREATE THOSE BUTTON STYLES

This is a bit hard to understand step for new comers so I will try to make it as simple as i can ( Understanding Insets and shadows ). For this example I created this button in Figma myself few months ago ( you can select from a inspo you found ) . By just seeing the button we can see , there is
  • some sort of gradient in bg
  • thick borders
  • some light shadow for 3D effect
Then I asked GPT to create the prompt as well by giving it the picture of the button styles and how it is gradient dark in bottom to gradient light on top . ( Visually try to understand how it works yourself )
Now it will give you a big json prompt, take it and paste it into lovable along with your bg image and VOILA
CURRENT PROMPT :
json
{
  "project": {
    "name": "BloomAI Landing Page",
    "type": "Marketing Website",
    "framework": "Next.js 15 + Tailwind CSS",
    "design_system": "Soft, airy, emotional, premium SaaS"
  },

  "global_styles": {
    "font_family": "Figtree",
    "font_width_adjustment": "-4%",
    "line_height": "1.15",
    "text_rendering": "optimizeLegibility",
    "letter_spacing": "-0.01em",
    "color_palette": {
      "primary_soft_pink": "#F8B4C6",
      "primary_pink": "#F4729E",
      "primary_dark_pink": "#EC407A",
      "background_light": "#FDF6F9",
      "text_dark": "#111111",
      "text_muted": "#555555"
    }
  },

  "background": {
    "type": "custom",
    "instruction": "Use the provided background image exactly as given. Do not alter lighting. Add subtle radial gradient overlay for depth.",
    "overlay": {
      "type": "radial",
      "opacity": 0.2,
      "center": "top center"
    }
  },

  "components": {
    "navbar": {
      "position": "fixed",
      "layout": "max-width centered container",
      "height": "80px",
      "items": [
        {
          "type": "logo",
          "text": "BloomAI",
          "font_weight": "700"
        },
        {
          "type": "links",
          "items": ["Features", "How It Works", "Pricing", "Testimonials"]
        },
        {
          "type": "cta_button",
          "label": "Get Started",
          "style_reference": "primary_button_style"
        }
      ],
      "background_blur": "backdrop-blur-md",
      "background_color": "rgba(255,255,255,0.6)"
    },

    "hero_section": {
      "layout": "centered vertical stack",
      "spacing": "large",
      "content_alignment": "center",
      "max_width": "900px",
      "elements": [
        {
          "type": "headline",
          "text": "Think Clearly. Build Fearlessly.",
          "font_size": "text-6xl md:text-7xl",
          "font_weight": "800",
          "line_height": "1.1",
          "animation": "blur-to-clear reveal on load"
        },
        {
          "type": "description",
          "text": "BloomAI transforms your scattered thoughts into structured action plans. Journal with AI, organize your ideas, and move forward with clarity.",
          "font_size": "text-lg md:text-xl",
          "color": "text-muted",
          "max_width": "600px",
          "animation": "fade + blur reveal delayed 150ms"
        },
        {
          "type": "cta_group",
          "layout": "horizontal",
          "gap": "16px",
          "buttons": [
            {
              "label": "Get Started",
              "style_reference": "primary_button_style"
            },
            {
              "label": "See How It Works",
              "style": "ghost with subtle underline"
            }
          ],
          "animation": "fade + blur reveal delayed 300ms"
        }
      ]
    },

    "social_proof": {
      "type": "trust_row",
      "content": "Trusted by 12,000+ creators and founders",
      "style": "muted centered text",
      "spacing_top": "large"
    },

    "features_section": {
      "layout": "3-column grid",
      "style": "glass cards with subtle blur",
      "cards": [
        {
          "title": "AI Thought Structuring",
          "description": "Turn messy brain dumps into clean execution roadmaps."
        },
        {
          "title": "Focus Mode",
          "description": "Remove distractions and work inside a calm, guided writing environment."
        },
        {
          "title": "Execution Planner",
          "description": "Convert insights into tasks automatically with AI assistance."
        }
      ]
    },

    "testimonial_section": {
      "style": "centered large quote",
      "quote": "BloomAI feels like thinking with a second brain.",
      "author": "Founder, YC-backed startup"
    },

    "final_cta_section": {
      "layout": "centered vertical",
      "headline": "Start thinking with clarity today.",
      "cta_button": {
        "label": "Get Started Free",
        "style_reference": "primary_button_style"
      }
    }
  },

  "button_styles": {
    "primary_button_style": {
      "shape": "pill",
      "border_radius": "9999px",
      "padding": "px-10 py-4",
      "font_weight": "600",
      "background": {
        "type": "solid",
        "color": "#F8B4C6"
      },
      "inner_shadow": {
        "type": "gradient",
        "direction": "from bottom",
        "colors": ["#EC407A", "transparent"],
        "opacity": 0.6,
        "blur": "medium"
      },
      "border": {
        "color": "#FFFFFF",
        "width": "6px"
      },
      "outer_shadow": {
        "color": "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",
        "blur": "20px",
        "offset_y": "6px"
      },
      "hover": {
        "scale": 1.03,
        "brightness": 1.05
      }
    }
  },

  "animations": {
    "page_load_sequence": {
      "type": "staggered reveal",
      "effect": "blur-to-clear",
      "initial_state": {
        "opacity": 0,
        "filter": "blur(12px)",
        "translateY": "20px"
      },
      "final_state": {
        "opacity": 1,
        "filter": "blur(0px)",
        "translateY": "0px"
      },
      "duration": "0.8s",
      "easing": "cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)"
    }
  },

  "conversion_elements": {
    "urgency_badge": "No credit card required",
    "microcopy_under_cta": "Free forever plan available",
    "pricing_teaser": "Starting at $12/month",
    "email_capture_option": true
  },

  "design_rules": [
    "Hero headline must dominate visual hierarchy",
    "Keep generous white space",
    "Use soft shadows only",
    "Avoid harsh blacks; use dark gray for text",
    "Ensure CTA button style matches attached reference exactly"
  ]
}
It might not give exact results in first go , so try to tweak it next 2-3 prompts with the help of the above principles I taught.
If you want more such tutorials for different themes and section, comment down below . Also let me know if I should create a video tutorial for it 🫶
